body.title: Phase D canonical exercise — unattended cc_send task completion
body.result: Phase D ex1-ex5 complete. ex5: added STORE_OBSERVE_RESULTS node to pe_chain — after OBSERVE, grep findings deposited as FACTUAL memory via store_factual. Igor now builds persistent codebase knowledge from each coding sprint. Chain: OBSERVE→STORE_OBSERVE_RESULTS→HYPOTHESIZE. 82 tests passing.
body.description: Three-exercise sequence to validate Igor autonomous task execution: A=proprioception self-diagnostic, C=tool census from warm TWM, B=gap_analysis arch doc reasoning. Each requires 2-3 tool calls + channel report.
